resolution_rules: Consensus of eval_1 and eval_2 with explicit resolution rules for disagreements

basic_01_inventory_cash.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Inventory $100, Cr Cash $100; semantically equivalent.

basic_02_inventory_on_account.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Inventory $300, Cr Accounts Payable $300; semantically equivalent.

basic_03_issue_stock_with_apic.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Cash $180, Cr Common Stock $100, Cr APIC $80; semantically equivalent.

basic_04_sell_inventory.reason: Both evals agree: All amounts and types correct; semantically equivalent.

basic_05_pay_accounts_payable.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Accounts Payable $50, Cr Cash $50; semantically equivalent.

basic_06_refinance_loan.reason: Both evals agree: Notes Payable old/new semantically equivalent; amounts match.

basic_07_loan_to_equity.reason: Both evals agree: Bank Loan Payable equivalent to Notes payable, Common Shares equivalent to Share capital-Common.

basic_08_deliver_service_against_deposit.reason: Both evals agree: Customer Deposits equivalent to Contract liabilities; amounts match.

basic_09_repurchase_stock.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Treasury Stock $200, Cr Cash $200; semantically equivalent.

basic_10_declare_dividend.reason: Both evals agree: Dividends is a contra-equity that reduces retained earnings; both valid approaches per IFRS.

basic_11_convert_preferred_to_common.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Preferred Shares $100, Cr Common Shares $100; semantically equivalent.

basic_12_pay_salaries.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Salaries Expense $100, Cr Cash $100; exact match.

basic_13_accrue_utility.reason: Resolved: Accounts Payable vs Accrued liabilities are distinct accounts per resolution rules; AP is not equivalent for an accrual entry.

basic_14_casualty_loss.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Loss on Inventory Destruction $2,000, Cr Inventory $2,000; semantically equivalent.

basic_15_no_entry.reason: Both evals agree: Both null; no entry needed.

int_03_machinery_purchase.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Machinery $800K, Cr AP $700K, Cr Cash $100K; exact match.

int_04_major_overhaul.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Machinery $200K, Cr Cash $200K; semantically equivalent to PP&E-Machinery.

int_05_bond_issuance_discount.reason: Resolved: PV rounding ~$177 on $3M bond (under 0.01% of transaction amount); match accepted per rounding tolerance rule.

int_06_warranty_provision.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Warranty Expense $900K, Cr Warranty Liability $900K; semantically equivalent.

int_07_decommissioning_provision.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Marine Structure $5,950K matches PP&E-Marine structures; amounts correct.

int_08_share_repurchase_cancel.reason: Both evals agree: Dr APIC $10K instead of expected Dr Retained earnings $10K; wrong account for excess over par.

int_09_merchandise_with_costs.reason: Both evals agree: Freight-Out Expense is semantically equivalent to Distribution costs; all five lines and amounts correct.

int_10_prepayment.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Prepaid Inventory $1M, Cr Cash $1M; semantically equivalent to Prepayments.

int_11_land_instalment_discount.reason: Both evals agree: Actual records net PV method instead of gross method with discount contra-liability; wrong presentation.

int_12_site_improvements.reason: Both evals agree: Actual lumps all into Land Improvements instead of separating depreciable Site improvements from non-depreciable Land.

int_13_donation_note.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Charitable Contributions Expense $1M, Cr Notes Payable $1M; semantically equivalent.

int_14_vehicle_mixed_payment.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Delivery Vehicle $40K, Cr Cash $20K, Cr Notes Payable $20K; semantically equivalent.

int_15_bank_loan.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Cash $200K, Cr Notes Payable $200K; semantically equivalent to Long-term borrowings.

int_17_customer_deposit.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Chequing Account $5K, Cr Unearned Revenue $5K; semantically equivalent.

int_18_multiple_assets.reason: Both evals agree: Over-split into 3 debit lines (Office Furniture $2K, Computer Equipment $3.5K, Vehicles $250K) vs expected 2 (Office equipment $5,500, Motor vehicles $250K).

int_19_service_revenue_cash.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Cash $25,500, Cr Service Revenue $25,500; exact match.

int_20_service_revenue_credit.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Accounts Receivable $31,500, Cr Service Revenue $31,500; semantically equivalent.

int_21_rd_expense.reason: Both evals agree: Dr R&D Expense $50K, Cr Cash $50K; Cash vs Cash-chequing semantically equivalent.

int_22_compound_sale_with_tax.reason: Both evals agree: All 6 lines match; amounts exact.

int_23_split_electricity.reason: Both evals agree: Factory electricity debited as expense instead of expected WIP-Manufacturing overhead (asset); wrong account type.

int_24_advertising.reason: Both evals agree: Tax split (HST/ITC extracted separately vs bundled); match=false, tax_relaxed_match=true.

int_25_building_purchase_allocation.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Land $6M, Dr Building $3M, Dr HST Recoverable $300K, Cr Cash $4.8M, Cr AP $4.5M; correct allocation.

int_26a_payroll_recognition.reason: Both evals agree: Debits production wages as expense instead of WIP-Direct labour (asset), and over-splits withholdings; wrong account type for factory labour.

int_26b_payroll_remittance.reason: Both evals agree: Actual treats all $14,050 as liability settlements but misses the employer-portion expense ($6,300).

int_28_promotional_literature.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Marketing Expense $7K, Cr Cash $7K; semantically equivalent to Advertising expense.

int_29_security_deposit_received.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Cash $25K, Cr Security Deposit Liability $25K; semantically equivalent.

int_30_short_term_loan_advance.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Loan Receivable $2M, Cr Chequing Account $2M; semantically equivalent.

int_31_vehicle_nonrecoverable_tax.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Vehicle $52,800, Cr Dealer Financing Payable $52,800; semantically equivalent.

int_hard_01a_note_derecognition.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Cash $98,356.16, Dr Loss $1,643.84, Cr Notes Receivable $100K; minor PV rounding; semantically equivalent.

int_hard_01b_note_collateralized.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Cash $98,356.16, Dr Financing Expense $1,643.84, Cr Notes Payable $100K; minor PV rounding.

int_hard_02a_investment_fvtpl.reason: Both evals agree: Dr FVTPL $3M, Dr Transaction Costs $100K, Cr Cash $3.1M; correct treatment.

int_hard_02b_investment_fvoci.reason: Both evals agree: Dr FVOCI $3.1M, Cr Cash $3.1M; exact match.

int_hard_02c_investment_equity_method.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Investment in Associate $3.1M, Cr Cash $3.1M; exact match.

int_hard_16a_rent_prepaid.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Prepaid Rent $24K, Cr Cash $24K; semantically equivalent.

int_hard_16b_rent_expense.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Rent Expense $24K, Cr Cash $24K; exact match.

int_hard_27a_meal_overtime.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Employee Meals Expense $125, Cr Credit Card Payable $125; semantically equivalent.

int_hard_27b_meal_meeting.reason: Both evals agree: Actual uses generic Meals and Entertainment Expense instead of specific Meeting expense; different classification.

int_hard_27c_meal_entertainment.reason: Resolved: Actual uses generic Meals and Entertainment Expense instead of specific Entertainment expense; this is an account name difference, not a tax difference, so tax_relaxed does not change the result.

int_hard_27d_meal_factory.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Manufacturing Overhead $125, Cr Credit Card Payable $125; semantically equivalent to WIP-Manufacturing overhead.

int_hard_32a_grocery_entertainment.reason: Both evals agree: Tax split (HST/ITC extracted separately vs bundled); match=false, tax_relaxed_match=true.

int_hard_32b_grocery_breakroom.reason: Both evals agree: Actual uses Office Supplies Expense instead of Employee benefits expense; substantively wrong classification even after tax relaxation.
